texto: I want to tell her that the pleasure for me wasn't planning or doing or leaving
autor: the pleasure was in seeing our strings cross and separate and then come back together.
explicacao: Citação de the pleasure was in seeing our strings cross and separate and then come back together. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I want to tell her that the pleasure for me wasn't planning or doing or leaving” articula reflexao, john-green, paper-towns em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como paper-towns.
